How many studio albums were published by Mercedes Sosa between 2000 and 2009 (included)? You can use the latest 2022 version of english wikipedia.

<reason>According to the English Wikipedia's discography for Mercedes Sosa, the studio albums released between 2000 and 2009 are: 1. Misa Criolla (2000), 2. Corazón libre (2005), 3. Cantora 1 (2009), and 4. Cantora 2 (2009). While "Cantora" is a project, Wikipedia lists them as two separate studio albums in her discography table. Other releases in this period, such as "Acústico" (2002), are classified as live albums.</reason>

<final_answer>4</final_answer>
